lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.

The car is in fair condition. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and minor dents. The interior shows significant wear from regular use. Mechanically, the car is functional but will require some upcoming maintenance and repairs.

This vehicle is in immaculate, showroom condition and has been maintained to the highest possible standards by its original owner. The exterior paint is absolutely flawless, retaining its original deep shine without a single scratch, chip, or door ding. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, and all electronic features function exactly as they did the day it left the factory. Mechanically, it is perfect, with a full service history and recent multi-point inspection confirming its top-tier status. Always garage-kept and never exposed to harsh conditions, this car offers a like-new driving experience for the discerning buyer.

Check out this dependable daily driver! This car is in fair condition and offers a fantastic balance of value and utility. While you’ll notice some character-building cosmetic wear and signs of use, it remains a solid, functional vehicle that’s ready for the road. It’s the perfect choice for someone looking for a budget-friendly option that still has plenty of life left in it!

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. The exterior has significant cosmetic issues, including widespread paint peeling, several large dents, and noticeable rust forming along the rocker panels. The interior shows heavy use with stained carpeting and torn seats. Mechanically, the car requires immediate attention; the engine has a persistent oil leak, the brakes are soft, and the suspension feels worn out. Most of the dashboard warning lights are illuminated. This is a project car that will need a trailer for transport and substantial investment to restore to a reliable state.

The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and multiple dents. The interior is heavily worn with tears in the upholstery. The engine and transmission require mechanical repair.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit delivers a refined driving experience. Every component has been subjected to our rigorous quality assessment, ensuring it meets our exacting standards for reliability and performance. A distinguished choice for those seeking exceptional value without compromise.

Hey there! I'm selling my reliable ride, and it's been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, perfect for someone looking for a dependable car that still looks great on the road. I've taken good care of it, and it's ready for its next adventure with you! Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

Used vehicle. Good condition. Clean title. Maintenance current. Minor wear. Runs strong.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and daily practicality. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, showing only the minor stone chips consistent with careful road use, while the body panels remain straight and free of significant blemishes. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the premium upholstery is supple with no tears, and all electronic features—including the navigation system and dual-zone climate control—operate flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, benefiting from a documented service history that ensures smooth gear shifts and a responsive engine. It handles with precision and offers a quiet, composed ride. This is a turn-key example for a buyer seeking a reliable, high-quality vehicle that has been treated with genuine care.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive engineering, this vehicle has been maintained to a high standard, ensuring consistent performance and long-term reliability. It offers a sophisticated driving experience and remains in commendable condition, representing an excellent balance of value and prestige for the discerning motorist.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a refined driving experience, balancing robust performance with sophisticated aesthetics. Presented in commendable condition, it has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and long-term reliability. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking exceptional value without compromising on quality.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my weekend trips. It looks great and runs even better! Perfect for someone looking for a dependable car that’s been well-cared for. Come take it for a spin, I know you'll love it as much as I have!

Offered is a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54B32 power plant. This high-revving straight-six utilizes individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing to deliver linear power up to its 8,000 RPM redline. Power is routed through a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission to an M-Variable limited-slip differential. Good condition. Reliable performance. Clean interior. Recent maintenance complete. Ready to drive.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of luxury and performance. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only minor road-wear consistent with its age, while the interior remains a smoke-free sanctuary with supple leather seating and fully functional electronics. Mechanically, it stands in excellent health, having recently undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection and oil service. It shifts smoothly and provides a quiet, confident ride. Complete with a full service history and two sets of keys, this car is ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately without any deferred maintenance.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined balance of performance and long-term reliability. With a clean service history and a well-preserved interior, this motorcar stands as a testament to quality engineering and responsible ownership. We invite you to experience the superior road manners and sophisticated presence of this exceptional selection.

This distinguished vehicle exemplifies a commitment to quality and mechanical integrity. Meticulously maintained throughout its tenure, the automobile offers a refined driving experience characterized by consistent performance and aesthetic appeal. An ideal acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a reliable, high-caliber transport solution.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in wonderful shape, super reliable, and has plenty of life left in it for its next owner. I’ve really looked after this one, so it’s ready to hit the road whenever you are! Feel free to reach out with any questions—I’d love to see it go to a great home.

This E46 M3 features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine, utilizing individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS variable valve timing system for exceptional throttle response. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag six-speed manual gearbox to a torque-sensing limited-slip differential. The suspension geometry maintains its factory-spec handling characteristics, supported by a reinforced rear subframe and refreshed bushings. Recent service includes a comprehensive valve adjustment and cooling system refresh. This is a mechanically sound driver’s car, offering a visceral analog experience with the reliability of a well-maintained drivetrain.
Used car. Good condition. Well maintained. Clean title. Runs smooth.

This vehicle is a standout example of a well-maintained daily driver that balances performance with everyday utility. The exterior finish remains vibrant and glossy, though it shows minor, honest signs of use such as small stone chips on the hood and a light scuff on the rear bumper consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the premium upholstery is free of tears, and the dashboard remains crack-free with all electronic components, including the infotainment system and dual-zone climate control, operating exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly with a consistent idle, backed by a comprehensive service history that includes recent fluid flushes and a new set of all-season tires with deep tread. The transmission shifts are seamless, and the suspension provides a firm yet comfortable ride without any unusual noises. This car is mechanically sound, aesthetically pleasing, and ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers an exceptional synthesis of performance and reliability. Featuring a clean profile and a well-preserved interior, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience. Every mechanical component has been thoroughly vetted to ensure continued excellence on the road.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that balances performance with enduring value. A robust service history ensures this automobile remains a reliable asset for its next proprietor.

Hey there! I'm parting with my trusty ride, and honestly, she's been absolute gold. It's been super well-maintained and still looks and drives great! Perfect for someone looking for a reliable daily driver that's been truly cared for. Come take it for a spin—you're going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and double VANOS for precise valve timing. Power is managed through a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential. The chassis has been enhanced with subframe reinforcement and a Bilstein B16 coilover setup, ensuring optimal damping and roll stiffness. Recent maintenance includes a comprehensive valve adjustment and rod bearing replacement for long-term mechanical reliability. Equipped with staggered Style 67 wheels and upgraded stainless steel brake lines, this example offers a visceral, analog driving experience with exceptional throttle response.
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. Runs well.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and presents beautifully in its original factory finish. The exterior maintains a deep gloss with only minor, expected road wear consistent with careful use, such as small stone chips on the front fascia. Inside, you’ll find a pristine, smoke-free cabin featuring supple leather upholstery with light creasing, and fully functional electronics, including the premium sound system and dual-zone climate control. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health; it boasts a documented service history, shifts smoothly through all gears, and sits on a set of tires with ample tread remaining. It drives straight and true, offering a refined, quiet experience for its next owner. This is a reliable, turn-key example that strikes the perfect balance between pride-of-ownership and everyday usability.

This distinguished vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a seamless blend of performance and reliability. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this automobile ensures a superior driving experience and stands as a testament to conscientious ownership. Secure a vehicle that balances sophisticated engineering with exceptional value.
